notices.message:
High tides this afternoon may lead to flooding. 
Flooding is possible from 1:00PM to 5:00PM on 15/02/2026. 
Strong winds combined with high tides may lead to wave overtopping. Locations most affected will be coastal roads and footpaths in Hendon Promenade, Seaburn Lower Promenade and Seaham Harbour and Docks between 1:00PM and 5:00PM. 
We are closely monitoring the situation . 
Avoid coastal roads, footpaths and carparks, which may be flooded . 
This message will be updated by 7:00PM on 15 May 2026 or as the situation changes.
notices.county: County Durham, Hartlepool, North Tyneside, South Tyneside, Sunderland

notices.description: Tidal Thames riverside from Putney Bridge to Teddington Weir
notices.message:
High tides today may lead to flooding. 
Flooding is possible from 1:15 PM to 3:15 PM on 15/05/2026. 
The forecast high tide at Richmond is 4.60 mAOD at 2:15 PM on 15/05/2026.

We believe there is a possibility of flooding for Putney Embankment (SW15), Chiswick Mall and Strand on the Green (W4), Thames Bank at Mortlake (SW14), Ranelagh Drive (TW1), Friars Lane and Water Lane (TW9), Riverside and The Embankment at Twickenham, and the Towpath below Teddington Lock. Flooding of properties is not expected.

Astronomical tide levels are rising. The river flow at Teddington Weir is 22 cubic metres per second and is steady. We anticipate the flows to remain steady for the next few days. 
We are closely monitoring the situation . 
Take care and avoid walking, cycling or driving through flood water . 
This message will be updated by 8:15PM on 15 May 2026 or as the situation changes.
notices.county: Greater London, Hammersmith and Fulham, Hounslow, Richmond upon Thames, Wandsworth
notices.ea_area_name: Kent, South London and East Sussex
